sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78209" key="paraknh/mion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρα-κνήμιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κνήμη</etym>) <sense id="n78209.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">outer shin-bone</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προκνήμιον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:190" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.190</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
